CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓

Changes made to validate-review-output.sh only:
1. Line 408-410: Combined nested 'if dim_score is not None: if not isinstance(...)' into single guard clause using 'and' operator (reduces depth 7 → 6)
2. Lines 420-422: Replaced 'for field in [...]: if field not in finding: errors.append(...)' with list comprehension + extend pattern (reduces depth 7 → 6)

merge-to-main.sh and validate.sh: already at max depth 6, no changes needed.
